1481:
WITH filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.TransactionID, t.Date, t.Time, t.CustomerID, t.CardID, t.GasStationID, t.ProductID, t.Amount, t.Price, y.Consumption
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND t.Date LIKE '%/%/13'
    WHERE t.Currency = 'CZK'
),
grouped_transactions AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment, MIN(Consumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM filtered_transactions
    GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment
),
sme_lam_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(MinConsumption) AS AvgSMEtoLAM
    FROM grouped_transactions
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM')
),
lam_kam_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(MinConsumption) AS AvgLAMtoKAM
    FROM grouped_transactions
    WHERE Segment IN ('LAM', 'KAM')
),
kam_sme_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(MinConsumption) AS AvgKAMtoSME
    FROM grouped_transactions
    WHERE Segment IN ('KAM', 'SME')
)
SELECT
    (SELECT AvgSMEtoLAM FROM sme_lam_diff) - (SELECT AvgLAMtoKAM FROM lam_kam_diff) AS DiffSMEtoLAM,
    (SELECT AvgLAMtoKAM FROM lam_kam_diff) - (SELECT AvgKAMtoSME FROM kam_sme_diff) AS DiffLAMtoKAM,
    (SELECT AvgKAMtoSME FROM kam_sme_diff) - (SELECT AvgSMEtoLAM FROM sme_lam_diff) AS DiffKAMtoSME;
